variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 11219 K Air Filter
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter SA 11219 K Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 11219 K Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 11219 K is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 129.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 103.5 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 64.5 mm, Height 1 (H1): 204.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 192.0 mm, Height 3 (H3): 184.0 mm
